volume_led_growth.name: Volume-Led Growth
volume_led_growth.description: Revenue growth is supported by healthy sales-volume growth rather than only pricing.

price_led_growth.name: Price-Led Growth
price_led_growth.description: Revenue growth is driven mainly by price or mix rather than unit growth.

demand_weakness_masked_by_pricing.name: Demand Weakness Masked by Pricing
demand_weakness_masked_by_pricing.description: Revenue grew despite declining sales volume, implying pricing or mix masked weaker demand.

volume_growth_monetization_weak.name: Weak Monetization of Volume Growth
volume_growth_monetization_weak.description: Volumes increased, but falling realization prevented comparable revenue growth.

positive_operating_leverage.name: Positive Operating Leverage
positive_operating_leverage.description: EBITDA is growing faster than revenue and margins are expanding.

negative_operating_leverage.name: Negative Operating Leverage
negative_operating_leverage.description: Revenue growth is not translating into EBITDA growth or margin improvement.

capacity_bottleneck.name: Capacity Bottleneck
capacity_bottleneck.description: Utilization is very high, limiting further volume growth without expansion.

underutilized_capacity.name: Underutilized Capacity
underutilized_capacity.description: A large share of installed capacity remains unused.

capacity_added_ahead_of_demand.name: Capacity Added Ahead of Demand
capacity_added_ahead_of_demand.description: Capacity expanded while utilization and sales-volume growth weakened.

inventory_build_risk.name: Potential Inventory Build
inventory_build_risk.description: Production materially exceeds sales volume, suggesting possible inventory accumulation.

order_book_acceleration.name: Order Book Acceleration
order_book_acceleration.description: Order book is expanding and new orders exceed current revenue execution.

order_book_depletion.name: Order Book Depletion
order_book_depletion.description: Order inflow is insufficient to replace executed revenue and backlog is shrinking.

strong_revenue_visibility.name: Strong Revenue Visibility
strong_revenue_visibility.description: The closing order book covers more than two years of annualized revenue.

backlog_not_converting.name: Backlog Conversion Risk
backlog_not_converting.description: Order book is growing, but reported revenue remains weak, suggesting execution delays.

high_margin_segment_mix_tailwind.name: High-Margin Segment Mix Tailwind
high_margin_segment_mix_tailwind.description: A segment with above-company margins is gaining revenue share.

low_margin_segment_mix_headwind.name: Low-Margin Segment Mix Headwind
low_margin_segment_mix_headwind.description: A below-company-margin segment is gaining revenue share.

segment_concentration_risk.name: Segment Concentration Risk
segment_concentration_risk.description: One business segment contributes an excessive share of company revenue.

geographic_concentration_risk.name: Geographic Concentration Risk
geographic_concentration_risk.description: One geography contributes an excessive share of company revenue.

customer_growth_quality.name: Healthy Customer-Led Growth
customer_growth_quality.description: Customer count is expanding without diluting revenue per customer.

customer_growth_dilution.name: Customer Growth with Monetization Dilution
customer_growth_dilution.description: Customer count increased, but revenue per customer fell materially.

market_share_gain.name: Market Share Gain
market_share_gain.description: The company gained meaningful market share YoY.

market_share_loss.name: Market Share Loss
market_share_loss.description: The company lost meaningful market share YoY.

capex_execution_on_track.name: Capex Execution On Track
capex_execution_on_track.description: Cumulative capex is broadly aligned with the approved project budget.

capex_overrun_risk.name: Capex Overrun Risk
capex_overrun_risk.description: Cumulative project spend exceeds the approved plan.

project_delay.name: Project Commissioning Delay
project_delay.description: Management has pushed the expected commissioning date back materially.

debt_funded_capex_risk.name: Debt-Funded Expansion Risk
debt_funded_capex_risk.description: Capex materially exceeds operating cash flow while net debt is rising.

deleveraging.name: Deleveraging
deleveraging.description: Net debt is falling and leverage is within a manageable range.

leverage_stress.name: Leverage Stress
leverage_stress.description: Net debt is high relative to annualized EBITDA.

revenue_guidance_upgrade.name: Revenue Guidance Upgrade
revenue_guidance_upgrade.description: Management raised the midpoint of revenue guidance.

revenue_guidance_cut.name: Revenue Guidance Cut
revenue_guidance_cut.description: Management reduced the midpoint of revenue guidance.

guidance_demand_disconnect.name: Guidance Ahead of Demand Evidence
guidance_demand_disconnect.description: Strong growth guidance is not supported by current volume or order-book trends.

presentation_reconciliation_issue.name: Presentation-to-Result Reconciliation Issue
presentation_reconciliation_issue.description: The sum of disclosed segment revenue does not reconcile with reported company revenue.
